---
title: "MATE 664 Lecture 10"
subtitle: "Atomic Models for Diffusion (III): Ideal Crystals"
author: "Dr. Tian Tian"
date: "2026-02-04"
format:
  html: {}
  revealjs:
    output-file: slides.html
  pdf:	 
    output-file: L10.pdf
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="revealjs"}

::: {.callout-note}
- Slides 👉  [Open presentation🗒️](./slides.html)
- PDF version of course note  👉 [Open in pdf](./L10.pdf)
- Handwritten notes 👉 [Open in pdf](./public/L10_annotated.pdf)
:::

:::
